name: @davidtorro/readme-gen
description: README.md generator for your projects. Creates a professional and attractive README quickly with optional local AI enrichment.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.banner: npm run build && node dist/main.js banner --force
scripts.readme:es: npm run build && node dist/main.js es --force
scripts.readme:es:ai: npm run build && node dist/main.js es --ai --force
scripts.all: npm run banner && npm run readme:ai
